name: ShopeePay
description: ShopeePay — Southeast Asia digital wallet by Shopee supporting QR, in-app checkout, and merchant integration across 7 SEA markets.

seo.title: ShopeePay — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: ShopeePay: ShopeePay — Southeast Asia digital wallet by Shopee supporting QR, in-app checkout, and merchant integration across 7 SEA markets.

when_to_use: ShopeePay wallet checkout for Indonesian and SEA merchants
QR-based in-app payment integration for Shopee ecosystem
Multi-market SEA wallet acceptance via ShopeePay API

pros: Native in Shopee's huge SEA ecosystem
review.verdict: Near-mandatory for SEA merchants on Shopee, but less ideal as a standalone gateway off-platform.
review.best_for: Merchants selling on Shopee or targeting ShopeePay wallet users across SEA
review.not_for: Off-platform merchants wanting a neutral, developer-first SEA gateway
